Short CV

She completed her undergraduate education at Yeditepe University, Faculty of Communication, Visual Communication Design Department in 2017. At the same time, she completed minor program in Advertising Design and Communication in 2018. She did an internship at various agencies during her undergraduate education. After working as a marketing communication specialist in the sector for 2 years after her undergraduate education, she started her graduate education in 2019 in the Department of Communication Sciences of Inonu University and completed it in 2021. She has been doing her PhD in Art and Design at Yıldız Technical University since 2022.
